Paragraph

A bounded real-valued function \(f\) defined on the rectangle \(R\) is Riemann integrable iff
\begin{equation} \forall \epsilon >0, \exists \text{ a partition } \cP:=\{R_{\alpha}\} \text{ such that } \sum_{\alpha} \osc(f,R_{\alpha})\vert R_{\alpha} \vert < \epsilon.\tag{5.2.2} \end{equation}
in-context
